content: Self-Refine and Reflexion can be combined to form a two-layer autonomous self-improvement loop for LLMs: Self-Refine handles iterative, task-specific output polishing in the short term, while Reflexion accumulates high-level pattern memory from past refinement cycles to guide better self-feedback in future tasks. This hybrid architecture leverages the strengths of both frameworks to turn isolated task improvement into cumulative long-term capability growth for autonomous agents.
